name: Zesty Carrot Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. On stovetop or in a microwave oven, cook carrots until tender.
2. Place the cooked carrots in a 1 quart baking dish; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine the next five ingredients and mix well.
4. Pour the mixture over the carrots.
5. Combine bread crumbs and butter, sprinkle on top.
6. Bake, uncovered, at 350 degrees for 25-30 minutes.
7. Sprinkle with cheese.
8. Return to the oven for 2-3 minutes or until the cheese melts.
